summary: Iter 38 / Polish-batch testing — verified all 3 polish items: (1) intern button relocation from Team to HR ✓, (2) Login UI redesign with AI-themed 3D + dual logos ✓, (3) Invoice PDF logo + single-line big total ✓. Backend 4/4 pass on _build_invoice_pdf helper. Frontend playwright confirms login canvas, brand strip, neural-core scene, intern modal opens from HR but is hidden in Team. Only finding: intern@projexino.com login now lands on /app/dashboard instead of /intern — possible regression vs iter37.

integration_issues.issue: After successful login with intern@projexino.com / Intern@2026 the URL becomes /app/dashboard instead of /intern (or /intern/dashboard) as documented in test_credentials.md and verified in iter37. localStorage was cleared before the test so no stale state. Possible Login.jsx role-routing regression or AuthContext returning a non-intern role for this user — worth a quick check.

verified_flows: GET /login renders the redesigned scene: <canvas> from react-three-fiber visible with wireframe icosahedron neural-core (cyan) + glowing white emissive sphere + floating colored cubes (visible in screenshot).
Top-left brand strip 'PROJEXINO · Workspace OS' is rendered with a white rounded badge containing the Projexino bird logo — eye-test PASSES.
Inner round PROJEXINO logo badge present on the top-right of the login card — eye-test PASSES.
'AI-NATIVE WORKSPACE' badge visible in the left brand block. Three feature chips render: 'AI co-pilot built-in' · 'Audit-grade RBAC' · 'Neural workflows'.
No legacy torus-knot / dodecahedron solids visible (replaced by wireframe neural core + cube data-nodes per spec).
Wrong-password POST stays on /login (toast emitted; URL unchanged) ✓.
Team page (/app/team) → Interns tab: [data-testid=add-intern-btn] count=0, [data-testid=add-intern-hint] count=1 — exactly as spec.

HR module (/app/hr) → [data-testid=hr-tab-interns] present and clicking it shows InternsBoard with [data-testid=add-intern-btn] count=1, [data-testid=add-intern-hint] count=0. Clicking the button opens [data-testid=intern-modal] ✓.
Settings 5-tab regression: Gmail, Email Templates, Notifications, AI Settings, Notif. Permissions all rendered ✓.
Backend _build_invoice_pdf with 7-digit total (₹1,234,567.89): pdfplumber-extracted 'TOTAL DUE' line contains the full amount string on a single line (no break) ✓.
Backend _build_invoice_pdf — first page contains either embedded logo image (RLImage) OR the 'PROJEXINO' bold-text fallback. Both paths exercised, logo space is allocated either way ✓.
Backend invoice metadata: invoice_no, client name, and amount string all appear in extracted text ✓.
action_items: Investigate intern role-routing regression: intern@projexino.com is being routed to /app/dashboard instead of /intern. Check Login.jsx routing logic (the iter37 report flagged this same area on line 108) — likely the role-from-localStorage fallback now defaults to /app for the intern. Quick fix: derive role from the login() return value rather than reading pj_role JSON afterwards.
critical_code_review_comments: Login.jsx: role-routing still tightly coupled to pj_role localStorage entry — see iter37 review comment. Today's run shows the symptom (intern → /app/dashboard).
finance.py:_build_invoice_pdf is 600+ lines in one function — readable but a refactor into _brand_band / _totals_card / _items_table sub-builders would help future maintenance.
Team.jsx + HRModule.jsx now share InternsBoard via canCreate prop — clean & DRY ✓. Hint chip in Team page reads 'Add from HR → Interns' which matches the new HR tab — copy is consistent.
test_credentials: admin@projexino.com / Projexino@2026 (works, lands /app/dashboard), intern@projexino.com / Intern@2026 (works but lands /app/dashboard instead of /intern — see action_items).
seed_data_creation: None — invoice PDF tests are unit-level against the _build_invoice_pdf helper with TEST_QA_ dummy data, no DB writes.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 polish items ship-ready. Phase C (Documents upload) and Phase D (Clients module) still pending and untested. The only follow-up is the intern-routing regression — small fix in Login.jsx most likely. Backend invoice helper is solid: re-run test_iter38_polish.py after any finance.py change.
rca of the issue: Intern routing regression: previously (iter37) intern@projexino.com → /intern, now → /app/dashboard. Login.jsx reads pj_role from localStorage AFTER login() resolves; AuthContext.login may now store the intern role under a different key (e.g. pj_user.role) so the JSON.parse fallback fires and the router defaults to /app/dashboard. Reproduction: clear localStorage, post-login intern creds, observe location.href. Mitigation: have AuthContext.login() return {user} and derive `const isIntern = user.role === 'intern'` directly from the return value before navigating — no localStorage round-trip.
